title: App roles collection schema
description: A schema for retrieving the app roles.

collection.description: A collection of the app roles.

items.title: App role schema
items.description: A schema for information about an app role.

roleNumber.description: A reference number for the app role.

requiredModules.title: Required modules
requiredModules.description: An array containing the required modules.

items.description: An array of the required modules needed.

moduleNumber.description: A reference number for the module.

self.description: A unique reference to the module resource.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the app role collection.
